titleStmt.title: SII 24.531: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 531. (A.R. No. 299 of 1950-51.) II PRĀKĀRA, WALL OF THE VERANDAH BEHIND THE NĀYAKA IMAGES, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ENTRANCE INTO THE PERFUMERY ROOM

summary.p: Registers an endowment of money as poliyūṭṭu by Emaḷūranār, a Sāttāda Vaishṇava, for offerings to the god on the occasion of the deity's halt at the yāgaśāla on the first day of Tiruppavitrattirunāḷ. The details of date viz., Śaka 1558, Dhātu, Kaṉṉi, śu. 3, Chittirai, Tuesday may be equated to 1636 A.D. August 23, ·57 f.d.n. ·26, but the solar month would be Siṁha and not Kaṉṉi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī śakāttam 1000 5 100 5 10 8
Itaṉ mel cellā niṉṟa tātunāma caṅvaccarattu kaṉ
ṉiṉāyaṟṟu pūṟuvapakṣattu tirutikaiyum cittirai nakṣattira
mum peṟṟa maṅkalavāra ṉāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭiyakula
Ācaṉi vaḷ(ā)nāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāviti vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvaraṅ
kam tiruppati perumāḷ śrīraṅkaṉātacuvāmi śrīpaṇ
ṭārattukku Ittiruppati cāttāta vayiṣṇavāḷil
paṭṭar Emaḷuraṉāreṉ deṇṭaṉ camaṟppittu poliyū
ṭṭu cilācācanaṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta paṭi
māta tiruppavuttirattiruṉāḷ mutalttiru ṉāḷaikku yāka
cālayil Eṟiyaruḷi nama Amutu ceytaruḷum to
cai 11 kku pu10 veḷḷi campā 91 kku pu5 poṉ 1pu2 I
ppaṇam paṉṉi Iraṇṭukkum poliyūṭṭukku koyilpaṇṭā
rattil 1 poṉ poṉ 2 10 Innūru
vukku Araippaṇamāka māta Oṉṟu
kku pu 8 varuṣam 1 kku paṇam paṉṉiiraṇṭukkum vaṭṭi
Uttāramāka Ācantirāṟkacātiyāka cantirātittava
raiyum Irukkak*kaṭavaṟākavum Itukku
vaṭṭi cāttātavāḷ
ttuk koḷḷavum
Ippaṭikku poliyūṭṭu cilācācaṉam
paṇṇikkuṭutteṉ perumāḷ śrīra
ṅkaṉāta cuvāmi śrīpaṇṭārattukku
paṭṭar Emaḷūraṉāreṉ
Ippaṭikku poliyūṭṭu cilācācaṉam Eḻu
tiṉamaikku koyil kaṇakkuBuilt in by platform.
Digital edition of SII 24.531 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
